scripts.seed:local: node scripts/generate-seed.mjs && wrangler d1 execute kitpics --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute kitpics --local --file=./migrations/0002_seed_kits.sql
scripts.seed:remote: node scripts/generate-seed.mjs && wrangler d1 execute kitpics --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute kitpics --remote --file=./migrations/0002_seed_kits.sql
